titlestmt.author: Compiled by S.L.

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: First Methodist Episcopal Church of Pultneyville records

origination.label: Creator
origination.corpname: First Methodist Episcopal Church of Pultneyville (Pultneyville, N.Y.)

did.abstract: Two registers (1852-1874) which list baptisms, marriages, members, subscribers to periodicals, class leaders, preachers and probationers. A third volume contains trustee minutes (1850-1851, 1858-1861, 1890-1900) reporting on elections and repairs to church property.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
bioghist.p: In 1811 a local preacher, Josiah Fowler came from Palmyra and formed a Methodist Society. In 1825 this society joined with the Episcopal and various unnamed denominations to build the Union Church of Pultneyville. In 1859 a schism between the Methodists and Episcopalians occurred, and the building was turned over to secular use. This congregation was formed on June 1, 1850. It re-incorporated again on April 8, 1872. It was part of the Pultneyville circuit, Rochester district, East Geneva conference.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: This collection consists of two registers covering the years 1852-69 which contain records of baptisms, marriages, members, subscribers to periodicals, class leaders, preachers, and probationers. The last volume contains sketchy trustees' minutes covering 1850-51, 1858-61, 1890-1900, when a new parsonage was built.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: First Methodist Episcopal Church of Pultneyville records, #6046. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

controlaccess.geogname: Wayne County (N.Y.) -- Religious life and customs.
controlaccess.subject: Methodist Episcopal Church -- New York (State) -- Pultneyville.
controlaccess.corpname: United Methodist Church of Pultneyville (Pultneyville, N.Y.)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: [Blank pages were not filmed.]

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Information on the construction of the church in 1874. Partially illegible statement on the 1872 incorporation. Record of Baptisms containing date, name of persons baptised, (whether infant or adult), residence, officiating minister, and witnesses for Sept. 1852-1874.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Removed from the volume.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Record of Marriages containing date, name of parties, residences, place of marriage, officiating minister, and witnesses covering Sept. 1852-74,

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Ontario Circuit Genesee Conference Preachers and Elders, 1815-46.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Record for Probationers listing date, name, condition, age, residence, class leader, and remarks for 1851-1855.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Alphabetical list of members contains name, residence, time and mode of joining, class leader, and remarks, c. 1851-1855*

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Periodicals list includes subscribers, residence, date of subscription, and when terminates for The Church Advocate and Journal, The Ladies Repository, The Northern Christian Advocate, and The Sunday School Advocate.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: List of local preachers giving name, residence, remarks, with stewards, their residences, and class leaders and their residences.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: List of unidentified names.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Name of subscribers who contributed towards the purchase of this volume.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: July 1859 - August 1869. Contains name, date of birth, residence, officiating minister, witnesses. (Shows large numbers of baptisms at some dates, possibly indicating revivals).

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Marriages, October 1860 - Lists date, name of parties, residence, place of marriage, officiating minister, and witnesses.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Record for Probationers February 1861-1870 lists date, name, condition, residence, class leader, and remarks. (Illegible in places).

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: July 1870 list of members with residences and remarks.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: August 12, 1877 list of members with residence and remarks, class leader.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Probationers.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 1860 list of pastor, preachers, exhort er, stewards, leaders broken down by locality.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Alphabetical list of members listing residence, time and mode of joining, class leader and remarks.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Additional membership list. Classes listing leader, when meets, members names, and remarks.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Centenary Society, membership list, n.d.

did.unittitle: "A Record Book; Belonging to the Trustees of the First Society ofthe Methodist Episcopal Church of Pultneyville." 1850-51, 58, 60-6l, 1889, 1893, 1894, 1900 . Unpaginated, chronological order.
